# Resource (hush_azure_app_access_credential)

Manage Azure app dynamic access credentials in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create an Azure app credential with a client secret
resource "hush_azure_app_access_credential" "example" {
  name             = "prod-azure-app"
  description      = "Production Azure app credential"
  deployment_ids   = [hush_deployment.example.id]
  tenant_id        = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
  client_id        = "87654321-4321-4321-4321-210987654321"
  client_secret_wo = var.azure_client_secret
}

# Create an Azure app credential with managed identity (no explicit credentials)
resource "hush_azure_app_access_credential" "managed_identity" {
  name           = "prod-azure-app-mi"
  description    = "Azure app credential using managed identity"
  deployment_ids = [hush_deployment.example.id]
  tenant_id      = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Azure app access credential
- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential
- `tenant_id` (String) The Azure tenant ID (must be a valid UUID)

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Azure app access credential
- `client_id` (String) The Azure client ID (must be a valid UUID)
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The Azure client secret
- `client_secret_wo` (String, Sensitive, Write-only) The Azure client secret (write-only). This is a write-only attribute that is more secure than `client_secret` because Terraform will not store this value in the state file. Either `client_secret` or `client_secret_wo` must be specified.
- `client_secret_wo_version` (String) Used to trigger updates for `client_secret_wo`. This value should be changed when the client secret content changes. Can be any value (e.g., a timestamp, version number, or hash).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Azure app access credential
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
